mapper.select: SELECT id, gold_price, silver_price, ratio, record_date AS recordDate, record_time FROM gold_silver_ratio ORDER BY record_date DESC, record_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, gold_price, silver_price, ratio, record_date AS recordDate, record_time FROM gold_silver_ratio ORDER BY record_date DESC, record_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT id, gold_price, silver_price, ratio, record_date AS recordDate, record_time FROM gold_silver_ratio WHERE record_date >= #{start} AND record_date <= #{end} ORDER BY record_date DESC, record_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gold_silver_ratio WHERE record_date = STR_TO_DATE(#{dateStr}, '%Y%m%d')
